content:
# Jafurah Sub Basin

**Summary**: A frontier unconventional exploration play in the Arabian basin.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-mohammed|Mohammed, 2017]] focused on the Jafurah Sub-Basin for evaluating unconventional resources.

- [[2020-usman|Usman, 2020]] located the study area within the Jafurah sub-basin of the central Arabian basin.

- [[2022-septriandi|Septriandi, 2022]] investigated the Jubaila Formation within the Jafurah sub-basin.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2017-mohammed|Mohammed, 2017]] east of the Ghawar Oil Field

- [[2020-usman|Usman, 2020]] located the study area within the Jafurah sub-basin of the central Arabian basin.

- [[2022-septriandi|Septriandi, 2022]] investigated the Jubaila Formation within the Jafurah sub-basin.

## Formations Present

- [[2017-mohammed|Mohammed, 2017]] Tuwaiq Mountain, Hanifa, Jubaila

## Key Findings From This Location

- The basin is a new frontier equivalent to the Eagle Ford play in Texas. ([[2017-mohammed|Mohammed, 2017, p. 66]])

- The basin is considered a promising prospect for unconventional exploration and development. ([[2020-usman|Usman, 2020, p. 19]])

- The basin contains significant unconventional resources in its Jurassic mudstones. ([[2022-septriandi|Septriandi, 2022, p. 5]])
